data.title: VersaBank Sets April 8, 2026 Date for Hybrid Annual and Special Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Versabank ( (TSE:VBNK) ) has issued an update.

On March 25, 2026, VersaBank announced that its 2026 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders will be held on April 8, 2026 at 10:30 a.m. ET at the VersaBank Innovation Centre of Excellence in London, Ontario, with a live-stream available through the bank’s website and an archived recording posted afterward. Shareholders participating online will not be able to vote during the meeting and must submit proxy instructions to Odyssey Trust Company by 10:30 a.m. ET on April 6, 2026, a structure that preserves formal voting controls while broadening access and engagement for investors through the virtual viewing option.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VBNK) stock is a Hold with a C$21.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Versabank stock, see the TSE:VBNK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VBNK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VBNK is a Neutral.

The score is driven mainly by decent financial strength (improving leverage and strong recent cash generation) but held back by clear profitability deterioration (lower margins/ROE and elevated efficiency ratio). Technicals are also a drag with the stock trading below key short-term moving averages and weak RSI, while valuation is only moderately supportive.

To see Spark’s full report on VBNK stock, click here.

More about Versabank

VersaBank is a North American, federally chartered digital bank operating in both Canada and the U.S. with a branchless, business-to-business model built on proprietary technology, targeting underserved segments of the banking sector through electronic deposit-gathering and funding via financial intermediary partners. The bank also operates Minnesota-based DRT Cyber Inc., providing cybersecurity services and digital-asset technologies, and it recently expanded its long-standing Structured Receivable Program for point-of-sale finance companies into the U.S. market.

Average Trading Volume: 30,801

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$605.5M

For an in-depth examination of VBNK stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Viomi Technology Posts 2025 Results, Declares Special Dividend as Global Water Push Accelerates
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Viomi Technology Co ( (VIOT) ) is now available.

On March 25, 2026, Viomi reported unaudited results for the second half and full year 2025, showing second-half net revenue down 25.9% to RMB950.6 million and net income to ordinary shareholders down 70.2% to RMB21.2 million, mainly due to reduced Chinese subsidies and softer home water system demand. For full year 2025, however, revenue from continuing operations rose 14.6% to RMB2,428.2 million while net income eased only 1.9% to RMB141.6 million, as Viomi sharpened its focus on water solutions after divesting most IoT@Home assets and declared a special cash dividend to return capital to shareholders.

Management highlighted the momentum of its “Global Water” strategy, with strong sequential sales growth via Amazon in North America, tailored product launches and brand-building in Southeast Asia, and accelerated AI- and health-focused innovation. The company ramped up its overseas “Water Purifier Gigafactory,” with a premium production line supporting instant heating, cooling, and ice-making features for Western and Asian markets, and plans to leverage its expanding patent base and global certifications to strengthen competitiveness and scale in 2026 despite near-term margin and subsidy headwinds.

The most recent analyst rating on (VIOT) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Viomi Technology Co stock, see the VIOT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VIOT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VIOT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by improving fundamentals (revenue growth and better operating margins) and a strong balance sheet with low leverage, plus attractive valuation (low P/E and high yield). These positives are tempered by very weak technicals (downtrend and negative momentum) and lingering profitability/cash-conversion concerns (thin net margin and cash flow ratios at 0).

To see Spark’s full report on VIOT stock, click here.

More about Viomi Technology Co

Viomi Technology Co., Ltd. is a Chinese technology company focused on home water solutions, including water purifiers, dispensers, and related appliances, with a growing international footprint in North America, Southeast Asia, and Europe. Following an August 2024 divestment of most IoT@Home products, Viomi has repositioned itself as a specialized, AI-enhanced water technology player targeting health-oriented consumers and premium overseas channels.

Average Trading Volume: 337,950

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $92.42M

data.title: Cognyte Delivers Strong Fiscal 2026 Results and Lifts Outlook for 2027
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Cognyte Software ( (CGNT) ).

On March 25, 2026, Cognyte Software reported strong results for its fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 31, 2026, highlighted by double-digit revenue growth and sharply improved profitability. Quarterly revenue rose 12.4% to $106.2 million with GAAP net income of $5.1 million, while full-year revenue climbed 14.1% to $400 million and GAAP net income swung to a $4.6 million profit from a loss a year earlier.

Non-GAAP operating income more than doubled to $36.7 million for the year, Adjusted EBITDA jumped 66% to $48.2 million, and non-GAAP gross margin expanded to 73%, reflecting scale and operational efficiencies. The company ended the quarter with $116.9 million in cash and no debt, continued to execute on its share repurchase programs with $26.7 million cumulatively bought back since November 2024, and guided for fiscal 2027 revenue of about $448 million and roughly 40% Adjusted EBITDA growth, underscoring management’s confidence and solid visibility from growing backlog and remaining performance obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (CGNT) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cognyte Software stock, see the CGNT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CGNT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CGNT is a Neutral.

The score is supported by improving fundamentals and strong cash generation with low leverage, reinforced by a positive earnings update that included margin expansion and raised full-year guidance. Offsetting these positives, technicals are very weak with the stock trading well below key moving averages and negative momentum, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings (negative P/E).

To see Spark’s full report on CGNT stock, click here.

More about Cognyte Software

Cognyte Software Ltd., based in Herzliya, Israel, is a software-led technology company specializing in investigative analytics solutions that turn large volumes of complex structured and unstructured data into actionable intelligence. Its AI-driven platforms are used primarily by law enforcement, national security and intelligence agencies to enhance public safety, security and operational decision-making.

Rentokil Initial plc has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for March 2026, formally notifying investors that its Annual Report 2025 is now available as an exhibit to the submission. While the document itself does not detail financial performance, the lodging of the 2025 Annual Report signals a key point in Rentokil Initial’s annual reporting cycle and provides investors with the core reference document for assessing last year’s operations and governance. data.title: Execution Risks Cloud Achieve Life Sciences’ Commercial Plans for Cytisinicline
data.description:
Achieve Life Sciences (ACHV) has disclosed a new risk, in the Sales & Marketing category.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Achieve Life Sciences faces significant execution risk in commercializing cytisinicline, as success depends on rapidly building or outsourcing distribution, marketing, and sales capabilities it does not yet possess. Reliance on third parties, including its Omnicom partnership that requires pre‑approval spending, could lead to cost overruns, disputes, or launch disruption if approvals are delayed or denied.

The company’s ability to recruit and retain commercial talent, secure physician adoption, obtain favorable reimbursement, and access effective distribution channels remains uncertain and could limit market penetration even if cytisinicline is approved. Limited product breadth and unforeseen commercialization costs may further weaken its competitive position, particularly outside the United States where dependence on foreign partners reduces its control over sales execution.

The average ACHV stock price target is $16.00, implying 451.72% upside potential.

data.title: Major Insider Exodus at Guardian Pharmacy Services Sparks Market Buzz
data.description:

Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. Class A has seen a flurry of insider and major shareholder selling activity, with tens of millions of dollars’ worth of stock changing hands. Director William Bindley sold 3,570,677 shares for $105,977,693, while President & CEO Fred Burke disposed of 671,432 shares for $19,928,101. EVP, Sales & Operations Kendall Forbes sold 346,672 shares valued at $10,289,224, and Director John Ackerman sold 1,103,364 shares for $32,747,843. EVP and CFO David K Morris sold 187,855 shares for $5,575,536. Director Thomas J Jr Salentine matched Bindley’s move, also selling 3,570,677 shares for $105,977,693. Significant shareholder Bindley Capital Partners I, LLC likewise sold 3,570,677 shares for $105,977,693, while 10% owner group member Cardinal Equity Fund, L.P. sold 275,728 shares for $8,183,607, and Pharmacy Investors, LLC offloaded 827,636 shares for $24,564,236. Collectively, these transactions represent a substantial insider and large-holder exit from Guardian Pharmacy Services, Inc. Class A stock.

Recent Updates on GRDN stock

Guardian Pharmacy Services’ stock action over the last day centered on its upsized underwritten offering and related governance changes. The company priced a 6M‑share Class A offering at $31 in a largely non‑dilutive synthetic secondary, using proceeds from newly issued shares to repurchase an equal amount, while former controlling holders lost majority voting power, pushing Guardian into full NYSE governance compliance.

Analyst views and AI-driven ratings framed the name as fundamentally improving, citing strong cash generation, a cleaner balance sheet and positive technical momentum, but also flagged its rich valuation and policy and operational headwinds discussed on the recent earnings call. Earlier price target increases were tied to this combination of solid growth and cash flow trends offset by risks from IRA reimbursement pressures and the nonrecurring nature of some recent earnings benefits, which together temper upside expectations despite the supportive trading backdrop.
